findings.description: The `使用方法` section (s3) contains 5 h3 subsections (依存ライブラリの追加, log.propertiesの設定, Logbookの構成, JAX-RSクライアントにLogbookを登録, リクエスト/レスポンスのログを出力) with plain text clearly exceeding 2000 characters, but all content is merged into a single section s3 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 `使用方法` contains 5 h3 subsections each with substantial code examples and explanations. Knowledge file maps all to s3.

findings.description: PascalCase class name `BasicLogFormatter` is missing from s3 hints. It appears in the log.properties configuration code block as `writer.stdout.formatter.className=nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter`.
PascalCase class name `JsonPathBodyFilters` is missing from s3 hints. It appears in the Logbook configuration code example for masking array fields.
